MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-548087 WITH CASE CGC-15-547055
Off Calendar Feb-05-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gregory Shaughnessy, Esq. (415-435-2409) for Plaintiff/Moving party BUILD GROUP, INC.
No other Appearance.

Plaintiff submits to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BUILD GROUP, INC.'s MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-548087 WITH CASE CGC-15-547055 is GRANTED. Case No. CGC-15-547055 shall be designated the lead case. The Case Management Conference set for February 24, 2016 in case CGC-15-548087 shall be vacated. Order is signed in open court. (all purposes) (see scanned order for details)Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Attorney Gregory Shaughnessy telephone number 415-435-2409 for Plaintiff.
Sam Taherian telephone number 408-295-5595 Defendant in Propria Persona appeared by telephone.

The Court noted that Mr. Taherian did not notify the Court or Mr. Shaughnessy of his intent to argue. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PRO QUALITY BUILDERS, INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. Defendant has not cited case law or statutory authority to support the position that the demurrer to the complaint can be sustained because the parties signed a contract which contained mediation provisions. Defendant contends that paragraph 14.3 of the contract applies, but as Plaintiff correctly notes, paragraph 14.3 does not state that the parties must follow the mediation requirements before one of the parties initiates an action. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2015 Continued To Mar-16-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
